case_title: DITCHO S. DDS VS PUGH ARGENE DBA VANDERWATER & CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $497.93 FILED BY DITCHO S. DDS AS TO DEFENDANT PUGH ARGENE DBA VANDERWATER & CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PUGH ARGENE DBA VANDERWATER & CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DITCHO S. DDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUGH ARGENE DBA VANDERWATER & CO. $497.93 PRINCIPAL, $47.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.43 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PUGH ARGENE DBA VANDERWATER & CO.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $582.01 AS TO DEFENDANT PUGH ARGENE DBA VANDERWATER & CO.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PUGH ARGENE DBA VANDERWATER & CO.
